title: Review: docs: add CHANGELOG, fix versions and API docs
notes:

Pattern needs to be applied consistently to all field-capable backends. Vault field-selector put() semantics (overwrites all keys) deferred per memory.
Confidence: 12% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: vault field-selector put() semantics not reviewed (memory says defer); haven't tested doc examples compile on MSRV 1.75 (only tested on current toolchain). Would raise confidence with: vault integration test harness; MSRV CI run.
